title: chamaecrista lineata var. lineata
intro: Chamaecrista lineata var. lineata, also known as the bushy sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Chamaecrista lineata var. lineata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
